title: Institutions and political regimes
description: The foundations of political life: democracy and its etymology, the separation of powers according to Montesquieu, the difference between parliamentary and presidential regimes, monarchy versus republic, and a few key landmarks (the French Fifth Republic, the UN, the right to vote).
sources: Vie publique (DILA) — "Qu'est-ce que la séparation des pouvoirs ?": https://www.vie-publique.fr/fiches/19451-quest-ce-que-la-separation-des-pouvoirs

Conseil constitutionnel — Declaration of the Rights of Man and of the Citizen of 1789: https://www.conseil-constitutionnel.fr/le-bloc-de-constitutionnalite/declaration-des-droits-de-l-homme-et-du-citoyen-de-1789
United Nations — About the UN: https://www.un.org/en/about-us
Chemins de mémoire — "21 April 1944: French women win the right to vote": https://www.cheminsdememoire.gouv.fr/fr/21-avril-1944-les-francaises-obtiennent-le-droit-de-vote
